clusters.justification: This cluster captures the broad dimensional spectrum of emotional reactivity, threat detection, and autonomic arousal that maps onto corticolimbic and salience-detection circuitry.
These terms collectively represent the computation of subjective utility, incentive motivation, and reinforcement learning inherently mediated by frontostriatal and dopaminergic pathways.
This axis reflects internally directed, complex representational modeling of self and others (self-projection), which characteristically engages the default mode network.
